steps.title: Load runtime session
instructions: From Home, open Guided Test Run
Confirm runtime session default_spearhead is selected
Tap Load session (or use registry)

steps.title: Validate session wiring
instructions: Confirm battlepack id shows fire_and_jade
Confirm allowed factions include stormcast

steps.title: Import Spearhead list
instructions: Go to Army screen
Tap Load default list (stormcast_test_list)
Confirm units appear and validation passes

steps.title: Prebattle auto-apply (list JSON)
instructions: Confirm list baked battleTrait / enhancement / formation applied
Check banner prebattle line shows trait · enh · form · auto

steps.title: NFC — assign fresh tag
instructions: Navigate to NFC Assignment
Select first pending unit row
Arm write and provision a physical tag
Complete write success

steps.title: NFC — overwrite existing tag
instructions: Select a different pending unit
Scan a tag that already holds another entity
Review overwrite card — tap Overwrite to confirm
Optional: cancel once to see overwrite_cancelled in traces

steps.title: NFC — runtime tap & entity focus
instructions: After battle starts, scan an assigned tag
Verify selected entity updates (banner / chips)
Open contextual prompts if engine fires

steps.title: Ready checklist
instructions: Finish any remaining NFC assignments
Navigate to Ready Check
Confirm all gates green
Tap Start battle (enters prebattle / deployment flow)

steps.title: Deployment setup
instructions: Review roster / objectives / reminders
Copy Prebattle Debug if needed
Tap Begin Battle — you drive timing, not autoplay

steps.title: Battle intro — priority
instructions: Confirm battle runtime heading shows proactive assist
Use Next battle step or advance until Priority roll step
Manually roll priority on the table — app tracks step only

steps.title: Twist card
instructions: Advance battle step to twist_card
Draw twist physically — log mentally via notes

steps.title: Battle tactic card
instructions: Advance to battle tactic step
Draw tactic card per battlepack flow

steps.title: Hero phase — your turn
instructions: Keep Your Turn selected
Select roster entities via chips
Advance phase when hero actions complete

steps.title: Movement phase
instructions: Tap Next phase until Movement
Move models on table — app stays assist-only

steps.title: Shooting phase
instructions: Resolve shooting on table
Use engine prompts if abilities fire

steps.title: Charge phase
instructions: Declare charges physically
Use Enemy charge declared assist when testing reactions

steps.title: Combat phase — proactive
instructions: Fight on table
Advance battle step / phase as needed

steps.title: Opponent shooting — reactive
instructions: Switch to Opponent Turn
Tap Liberators / NFC if testing saves
Use Roll save / failed saves and defensive prompts

steps.title: Opponent combat — reactions
instructions: Stay in Opponent Turn — Combat
Tap Enemy attack declared
Apply damage with Apply damage control
Confirm Shield Wall or reaction prompts appear

steps.title: Saves & wound assignment
instructions: Use Save sequencing and Apply damage
Watch wound_assignment_started trace when starting allocation

steps.title: Counter abilities
instructions: Tap Use reaction / reactive ability buttons
Confirm counter_ability_used appears in traces when logging path fires

steps.title: Round summary
instructions: Review VP / battle step in assist panel
Advance battle round / steps per scenario on table

steps.title: Debug / replay validation
instructions: Open Debug / Replay screen
Filter traces by entity or event type
Export debug snapshot — compare to step checkpoints

steps.title: End guided test run
instructions: Copy final step debug
Clear scenario or reset runtime if starting over
Certification complete — file issues from checkpoints
